entities.name: Data
entities.context: Raw content, the starting point of the knowledge hierarchy

entities.name: Information
entities.context: Data that has been structured, organized, and made referenceable

entities.name: Knowledge
entities.context: Information that has been synthesized, validated, and connected to other beliefs

entities.name: Wisdom
entities.context: Knowledge that has been compressed, made operational, and has survived challenges

entities.name: DIKW Hierarchy
entities.context: V's framework for understanding how raw data transforms into actionable wisdom through progressive stages

relationships.context: Transitions when structured, organized, and made referenceable
Transitions when synthesized, validated, and connected to other beliefs
Transitions when compressed, operational, and has survived challenges
Data is the first stage in V's knowledge transformation framework
Information is the second stage in V's knowledge transformation framework
Knowledge is the third stage in V's knowledge transformation framework
Wisdom is the final stage in V's knowledge transformation framework
